proofs:
set (s := supOfScottContinuousMaps F F_isDirected sup_X). set (S := E.unions
           (E.image
              (fun f_i : sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) =>
               E.image (fun x : D => proj1_sig f_i x) X) F)). unfold is_supremum_of; intro u; split.

hypotheses: F : E.t (sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f))
goals.goal: forall _ : leProp s u, E.In u (upperboundsOf S)

attempts:
intro u; split.
- intros Hle x Hx_union; destruct Hx_union as [Y [ [y [-> HyX]] [f_i [-> Hf]] ]]; transitivity (proj1_sig f_i sup_X); [ apply (proj1 (ScottContinuousMap_preserves_supremum (proj1_sig f_i) X sup_X (proj2_sig f_i) X_isDirected sup_X_is_supremum_of_X (proj1_sig f_i sup_X)) (PreOrder_Reflexive _ _ (leProp_PreOrder PROSET') (proj1_sig f_i sup_X)) (proj1_sig f_i y) (In_image y eq_refl HyX)) | transitivity (supOfScottContinuousMaps F F_isDirected sup_X); [ apply (proj1 ((supremum_cpo_spec CPO') _ (supOfScottContinuousMaps_isWellDefined F F_isDirected sup_X)) (supOfScottContinuousMaps F F_isDirected sup_X) (PreOrder_Reflexive _ _ (leProp_PreOrder PROSET') (supOfScottContinuousMaps F F_isDirected sup_X)) (proj1_sig f_i sup_X) (In_image f_i eq_refl Hf)) | exact Hle ] ].
- intros Hupper; apply (proj1 ((supremum_cpo_spec CPO') _ (supOfScottContinuousMaps_isWellDefined F F_isDirected sup_X)) u); intros z [f_i [-> Hf]]; apply (proj1 (ScottContinuousMap_preserves_supremum (proj1_sig f_i) X sup_X (proj2_sig f_i) X_isDirected sup_X_is_supremum_of_X u)); intros y [y0 [-> HyX]]; apply (Hupper (proj1_sig f_i y0) (In_unions (E.image (fun x : D => proj1_sig f_i x) X) (In_image y0 eq_refl HyX) (In_image f_i eq_refl Hf))).

unfold is_supremum_of. unfold upperboundsOf in sup_X_is_supremum_of_X. intros u; split; intro H.
- unfold upperboundsOf; intro Hle; intros y Hy; apply leProp_trans with (supOfScottContinuousMaps F F_isDirected sup_X); [| exact Hle]. destruct Hy as [S HyS HSinF]; destruct HSinF as [f_i Heq Hinfi]; rewrite Heq in HyS; destruct HyS as [x Heq2 Hx]; rewrite Heq2. apply leProp_trans with (supOfScottContinuousMaps F F_isDirected x); [apply ((proj1 (supremum_cpo_spec CPO' (E.image (fun f_i' : sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) => proj1_sig f_i' x) F) (supOfScottContinuousMaps_isWellDefined F F_isDirected x)) (supOfScottContinuousMaps F F_isDirected x) (reflexivity _)) (proj1_sig f_i x)); apply In_image with f_i; auto | apply supOfScottContinuousMaps_isMonotonic; apply (proj1 (sup_X_is_supremum_of_X sup_X) (reflexivity _) x Hx)].
- unfold upperboundsOf in H; apply (proj2 (supremum_cpo_spec CPO' (E.image (fun f_i : sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) => proj1_sig f_i sup_X) F) (supOfScottContinuousMaps_isWellDefined F F_isDirected sup_X)) u). unfold upperboundsOf; intros y Hy. destruct Hy as [f_i Heq Hinfi]; rewrite Heq; apply (proj2 (ScottContinuousMap_preserves_supremum (proj1_sig f_i) X sup_X (proj2_sig f_i) X_isDirected sup_X_is_supremum_of_X) u); unfold upperboundsOf; intros y' Hy'; destruct Hy' as [x Heq2 Hx]; rewrite Heq2; apply H; apply In_unions with (E.image (fun x0 : D => proj1_sig f_i x0) X); [apply In_image with x; auto | apply In_image with f_i; auto].

refine (let supST := supOfScottContinuousMaps F F_isDirected sup_X in
        let T := E.image (fun f_i : sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) => proj1_sig f_i sup_X) F in
        let S := E.unions (E.image (fun f_i : sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) => E.image (fun x : D => proj1_sig f_i x) X) F) in
        let HsupT : is_supremum_of supST T :=
          supremum_cpo_spec CPO' T (supOfScottContinuousMaps_isWellDefined F F_isDirected sup_X) in
        let reflD x := PreOrder_Reflexive (leProp_PreOrder D PROSET) x in
        let reflD' x := PreOrder_Reflexive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') x in
        let transD' x y z := PreOrder_Transitive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') x y z in
        conj
          (fun (u : D') (Hle : leProp supST u) (y : D') (Hy : E.In y S) =>
            match Hy with
            | In_unions _ X' Hx_in_X' HX'_in_F =>
              match HX'_in_F with
              | In_image _ _ _ _ _ f_i Heq_X' Hfi =>
                (match Heq_X' in _ = X'' return (E.In y X'' -> E.In y (E.image (fun x : D => proj1_sig f_i x) X)) with
                 | eq_refl => fun H => H
                 end Hx_in_X')
                (fun Hx_in_X'_img =>
                  match Hx_in_X'_img with
                  | In_image _ _ _ _ _ x Heq_y Hx =>
                    let Hx_sup : leProp x sup_X :=
                      proj1 (sup_X_is_supremum_of_X sup_X) (reflD sup_X) x Hx in
                    let Hmono : leProp (proj1_sig f_i x) (proj1_sig f_i sup_X) :=
                      continuous_monotone D D' PROSET PROSET' CPO CPO' (proj1_sig f_i) (proj2_sig f_i) x sup_X Hx_sup in
                    let H_T_ub : leProp (proj1_sig f_i sup_X) supST :=
                      let HsupT_upper : forall u' : D', leProp supST u' -> forall y' : D', E.In y' T -> leProp y' u' :=
                        proj1 (HsupT supST) (reflD' supST) in
                      HsupT_upper supST (reflD' supST) (proj1_sig f_i sup_X)
                        (@In_image (sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f)) D'
                           (fun f_i' : sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) => proj1_sig f_i' sup_X) F
                           (proj1_sig f_i sup_X) f_i eq_refl Hfi) in
                    match Heq_y in _ = y' return leProp y' u with
                    | eq_refl => transD' (proj1_sig f_i x) (proj1_sig f_i sup_X) u Hmono (transD' (proj1_sig f_i sup_X) supST u H_T_ub Hle)
                    end
                  end)
              end
            end)
          (fun (u : D') (H_ub_S : forall y : D', E.In y S -> leProp y u) =>
            let HsupT_spec : is_supremum_of supST T := HsupT in
            proj2 (HsupT_spec u)
              (fun (y : D') (Hy : E.In y T) =>
                match Hy with
                | @In_image (sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f)) D'
                    (fun f_i' : sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) => proj1_sig f_i' sup_X) F
                    y f_i Heq_y Hfi =>
                  (match Heq_y in _ = y' return (y' = proj1_sig f_i sup_X -> leProp y' u) -> leProp y' u with
                   | eq_refl => fun k => k eq_refl
                   end)
                    (fun _ : proj1_sig f_i sup_X = proj1_sig f_i sup_X =>
                      let Hcont : isContinuous (proj1_sig f_i) := proj2_sig f_i in
                      let Hsup_fi_image : is_supremum_of (proj1_sig f_i sup_X) (E.image (fun x : D => proj1_sig f_i x) X) :=
                        continuous_sup D D' PROSET PROSET' CPO CPO' (proj1_sig f_i) Hcont X sup_X sup_X_is_supremum_of_X X_isDirected in
                      let H_upper_image : forall z : D', E.In z (E.image (fun x : D => proj1_sig f_i x) X) -> leProp z u :=
                        fun z Hz =>
                          H_ub_S z
                            (@In_unions D' (E.image (fun f_i' : sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) => E.image (fun x : D => proj1_sig f_i' x) X) F)
                              (E.image (fun x : D => proj1_sig f_i x) X) Hz
                              (@In_image (sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f)) (E.t D')
                                (fun f_i' : sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) => E.image (fun x : D => proj1_sig f_i' x) X) F
                                (E.image (fun x : D => proj1_sig f_i x) X) f_i eq_refl Hfi)) in
                      proj1 (Hsup_fi_image u) H_upper_image)
                end))).

set (s := supOfScottContinuousMaps F F_isDirected sup_X). set (S := E.unions
           (E.image
              (fun f_i : sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) =>
               E.image (fun x : D => proj1_sig f_i x) X) F)). unfold is_supremum_of; intro u; split.
- intro Hle; unfold upperboundsOf, E.unions, E.image; intros y Hy; destruct Hy as [Y [Hy_in_Y HY]]; destruct HY as [f_i [HY' Hf_i]]; subst Y; destruct Hy_in_Y as [x [Hy' Hx]]; subst y; transitivity (proj1_sig f_i sup_X); [apply (proj1 (proj1 (continuous_sup (proj1_sig f_i) (proj2_sig f_i) X sup_X sup_X_is_supremum_of_X X_isDirected) (proj1_sig f_i sup_X)) (PreOrder_Reflexive leProp (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') (proj1_sig f_i sup_X)) (proj1_sig f_i x)); exists x; auto | transitivity s; [apply (proj1 (proj1 (supremum_cpo_spec CPO' (E.image (fun f_i => proj1_sig f_i sup_X) F) (supOfScottContinuousMaps_isWellDefined F F_isDirected sup_X)) s) (PreOrder_Reflexive leProp (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') s) (proj1_sig f_i sup_X)); eexists; eauto | exact Hle]].
- intro Hup; apply (proj2 (supremum_cpo_spec CPO' (E.image (fun f_i => proj1_sig f_i sup_X) F) (supOfScottContinuousMaps_isWellDefined F F_isDirected sup_X)) u); unfold upperboundsOf; intros t Ht; destruct Ht as [f_i [Ht' Hf_i]]; subst t; apply (proj2 (continuous_sup (proj1_sig f_i) (proj2_sig f_i) X sup_X sup_X_is_supremum_of_X X_isDirected) u); unfold upperboundsOf; intros y Hy_img; destruct Hy_img as [x [Hy' Hx]]; subst y; apply Hup; unfold S; eexists (E.image (proj1_sig f_i) X); split; [ eexists x; split; eauto | eexists f_i; split; eauto ].

                (fun Hx_in_X'_img =>

                        (@In_image (sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f)) D'

            proj2 (HsupT_spec u)

                match Hy with
